evidence.snippet: LaunchPoint® designs and manufactures lightweight, high-specific-power motors, starter/generators and alternators for combat aircraft, uncrewed aircraft systems, and airborne pods. Our patented ironless axial-flux motor/generator technology delivers unmatched Size, Weight, and Power.

items.notes: Ironless axial-flux motors, alternators, and starter/generators (DHA050, DHA075, DHA120) for UAS and combat aircraft

evidence.snippet:
### SmartPoint™ Control Software
#### [Power Electronics and Control: Motor Controllers, Generator Control Units, Genset Controllers](https://launchpointeps.com/controllers/)
LaunchPoint’s SmartPoint™ Controllers are advanced electric motor drives, generator controllers, and hybrid electric power system management units that are designed for all electric and hybrid electric propulsion applications.
LaunchPoint Controllers (HPS055 PMU, HPS400 PMU, MC15, MC40, MC250)

items.notes: SmartPoint™ motor controllers, generator control units, and power management units (MC15, MC40, MC250, HPS055 PMU, HPS400 PMU)

evidence.snippet:
#### [Generator Sets](https://launchpointeps.com/gensets/)
Highly efficient and power-dense LaunchPoint gensets are patented technology that include an air-cooled alternator, lightweight aircraft engine, software, controls, and a battery management system enabling intelligent in-flight battery charging.

items.notes: Integrated generator sets (HPS055, HPS400) with alternator, engine, controls and BMS; LaunchPower™ battery management system

evidence.snippet:
**Powering Air Dominance: UAS, CCA, and Fighters**
-----------------------------------------------------
From 1.5–40kW UAS propulsion to 40–250kW aircraft power generation, LaunchPoint® is a key enabler for high performance platforms: manned fighters, Group 2-5 UAS, and support aircraft. Our ironless topologies cut mass and losses while boosting efficiency, thermal performance, and survivability.

#### [Generator Sets](https://launchpointeps.com/gensets/)
Highly efficient and power-dense LaunchPoint gensets are patented technology that include an air-cooled alternator, lightweight aircraft engine, software, controls, and a battery management system enabling intelligent in-flight battery charging.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells integrated power generation subsystems (gensets) and propulsion modules for Group 2–5 UAS and manned combat aircraft; gensets are fully integrated units (alternator + engine + software + controls + BMS)

evidence.snippet:
LaunchPoint Electric Machines (DHA050, DHA075, DHA120)
LaunchPoint’s Electric Machines (DHA050, DHA075, DHA120) are protected under one or more of the following U.S. patents: 8823238 B2, 10141822 B2, 10468955 B2, 10574110 B2; additional patents pending in the U.S. and internationally.

LaunchPoint’s SmartPoint™ Controllers are advanced electric motor drives, generator controllers, and hybrid electric power system management units that are designed for all electric and hybrid electric propulsion applications.

items.name: LaunchPower™
items.product_type: battery management system for hybrid-electric flight

evidence.snippet:
#### [Battery Management](https://launchpointeps.com/gensets/)
LaunchPoint has developed LaunchPower™ series of software and hardware solutions that are designed to be a sophisticated battery management system for high reliability battery packs used in electric and hybrid electric flight. Our technology is the brains behind the interface between the battery pack and the propulsion system.

products.notes: Core product SKUs identified from patent marking page; detailed product pages (/maap/, /motors-generators/, /controllers/, /gensets/) were skipped in crawl and may contain additional SKUs

ndaa.notes: Site displays 'NDAA Compliant' logo prominently in header and footer across all pages; no further detail on specific section (848/889) is provided

evidence.snippet: **GOLETA,** California – LaunchPoint Electric Propulsion Solutions, Inc., a leading developer of power generation and propulsion systems, has announced the achievement of both AS9100 and ISO 9001 certifications for its U.S. manufacturing facilities.

readiness.notes: AS9100D + ISO 9001 certified U.S. manufacturing facilities; named catalog SKUs (HPS055, HPS400, DHA050, DHA075, DHA120, MC15, MC40, MC250) in production; active AFWERX prototype program is a government development contract, not representative of primary commercial business

unresolved_questions: NDAA specific section (848 vs 889) not specified; site only shows 'NDAA Compliant' logo without detail
MAAP® role unclear — internal design tool vs. externally sold software product; product detail page was skipped

tagline: Designs and manufactures lightweight, high-efficiency electric motors, generators, and starter/generators using patented ironless axial-flux technology for combat aircraft, UAS, and airborne pods. NDAA-compliant, AS9100D-certified, made in USA. Notable: L3Harris selected them for next-generation electronic warfare pod power generation. Blue UAS status unknown; limited public evidence of current production UAS integration beyond platform claims.
